introSection: Cyclone was a wooden roller coaster built by Traver Engineering Company that was previously located at Revere Beach in Suffolk, Massachusetts, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Following the ride's closure, it was damaged by a fire in 1971. It burnt again in March 1974 and was demolished the following month.

fullText:
Cyclone was a wooden roller coaster built by Traver Engineering Company that was previously located at Revere Beach in Suffolk, Massachusetts, USA.

Following the ride's closure, it was damaged by a fire in 1971. It burnt again in March 1974 and was demolished the following month.
